The creator journey

Sirf 4 Step Mein
Sign-up Se Spotlight Tak.

STEP 01

Register Karo

Fill a 1-minute form. Free, no purchase needed to sign up.

STEP 02

Apna Badge Pao

Instantly receive a unique QCC ID and downloadable official badge.

STEP 03

Reel Banao

Shoot a fashion reel featuring Quality Dresses outfits. Bring your style.

STEP 04

Post Karo, Jeeto

Post with the official tag & your QCC ID. Judges pick the winners.

Real prizes · real transparency

₹40,000+ Cash Prize Pool

No mystery about the money. Here's exactly what's on offer and exactly how it's won.

Real Cash. Real Winners. No Lucky Draw.

Total Cash Prize Pool
₹40,000+

Four categories, four winners. Every entry is judged on real, organic performance — not paid promotion.

🥇

Your reel's total organic view count

Most genuine comments
One reel can win only one category. If an entry qualifies for multiple categories, the highest-value prize will be awarded — so every winning slot goes to a different creator wherever possible.
What "Organic" means: No paid promotion, no boosting, no fake engagement, no purchased views. Only genuine, unpaid reach counts toward judging.

The official rulebook

Clear rules. Fair play.

Simple Rules. Fair Competition. Real Winners.

Everything you need to know before you submit. Read carefully — these are binding for all participants.

Eligibility

  • Open only to creators residing in Bharuch District.
  • Minimum age 13+.
  • Instagram account must remain public throughout the contest.
  • Quality Dresses employees and their immediate family members cannot participate.

Reel Requirements

  • Only original content — no copied reels, no watermark from other contests.
  • One participant may submit up to two reels.
  • Only Quality Dresses outfits should be featured.
  • Duration 15–60 seconds, vertical 9:16 format.

Posting & Tagging

  • Must tag @qualitydresses.
  • Use the official hashtag #QCC2026.
  • Your QCC ID must be written in the caption.
  • No offensive, political, religious, illegal, unsafe or adult content.

Fair Play & Prizes

  • Quality Dresses reserves final judging rights. Management's decision is final.
  • Fake engagement may lead to permanent disqualification.
  • Paid ads or boosting are prohibited — only organic reach is judged.
  • Cash prizes are released only after successful verification.
  • Late entries are not accepted.
  • If duplicate or fake accounts are used, the entry will be disqualified.
  • All prizes are subject to applicable Indian tax laws, if applicable.

Verification

  • Reels must remain public until winners are announced.
  • Only original content is accepted — no reposts or recycled reels.
  • Winners may be asked to provide Instagram Insights to confirm organic reach.
  • Quality Dresses reserves the right to verify authenticity before prize distribution.
  • If a winner cannot provide proof of organic reach, the prize may be awarded to the next eligible creator.
